artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of an aged goblin advisor seated in a dim back room, leaning back into shadow with a smoldering cigar, half his lined face carved by a single pool of warm amber lamplight while curling smoke veils the rest; worn card table and bottle glint at the edge of frame, ink-black darkness pressing in, his knowing half-lidded eyes radiating quiet menace, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Cigar-Smoke Consigliere
text:
When Cigar-Smoke Consigliere enters the battlefield, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.
{1}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice a Favor token: Draw a card. The advice is free. The Favor was not.
flavorText: He never raises his voice. He never has to. He knows what you did last summer, and the summer before.
